section_miscategorizations.text: Chest X-ray shows normal lumbar spine alignment.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This statement is internally inconsistent and misleading: a chest X-ray would not appropriately be used to assess lumbar spine alignment. While it is in the correct high-level section (Findings vs. HPI/Assessment/Plan), the specific pairing of imaging modality and anatomic finding is clinically incorrect enough that it could mislead a reader about what study was actually performed or what was visualized.
